title: zyrphelis outeniquae
intro: Zyrphelis outeniquae, also known as the Red Hottentot Tea, is a plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its bright red flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Zyrphelis outeniquae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, often used to make teas and tonics, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
